Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You don't stop by very often, Senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}No, not particularly. Is this a bad time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I wonder what this Nyx is like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, by the way, I've made my decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I want to fight to the end. It's better than doing nothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}The Kirijo Group is slowly regaining its footing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}After I graduate, the plan is for me to eventually take over as leader.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Turning back was never really an option for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}If we can defeat Nyx and I die in the process, then the company will continue on without me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}And I'm confident they'd carry on my wishes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}But from what we've heard, Nyx can't be defeated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}We've got someone on our team who seems pretty unkillable, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}And he's an exceptional Persona-user, even if Death was empowering him from within.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}You know, if things don't work out, I think I'll still be okay as long as I'm with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Honestly, I don't think it matters if we live or die.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}All that really matters is that we're proud of how we lived.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}And I know I'd be proud if we decided to fight Nyx.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Is this about honoring your father's legacy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Yeah, that's part of it. But mostly, it's about me and how I feel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Senpai, a while back, you asked me to face what comes next with you.[n]{f 1 1}
